title: Did the young man speak English?

meanings.usage: 形容事物或经历让人感到有趣或好笑
指个人亲身经历过的事情
在英国英语中指出于好心让人免费搭车
相当于except for，表示不包括在内
表示在某段时间内发生
指从一地到另一地的旅行过程
表示接近某个程度或时间
描述事情发生得很快且出乎意料
指对问题或话语作出回应
反身代词，表示动作作用于说话者自己
反身代词，指代前述的男性
表示两者都不，后接of或单数动词

phrases.usage: 请求搭便车，指请求别人让你免费乘车

examples.en: A young man waved to me and asked me for a lift.
examples.zh: 一个年轻人向我挥手，请求搭便车。

phrases.usage: 一...就...，表示两件事紧接着发生

examples.en: As soon as he had got into the car, I said good morning to him.
examples.zh: 他一上车，我就用法语向他问好。

examples.en: Apart from a few words, I do not know any French at all.
examples.zh: 除了几个词，我根本不会法语。

phrases.usage: 向某人挥手，表示招呼或告别

examples.en: On the way, a young man waved to me.
examples.zh: 在路上，一个年轻人向我挥手。

phrases.usage: 继续驾车前往，后接目的地

examples.en: I drove on to the next town.
examples.zh: 我继续驾车前往下一个城镇。

phrases.usage: 我们两人都没有，表示两者否定

examples.en: Neither of us spoke during the journey.
examples.zh: 旅途中我们两人都没说话。

phrases.usage: 在...的南部，表示地理位置

examples.en: I left a small village in the south of France.
examples.zh: 我离开了法国南部的一个小村庄。

phrases.usage: 得知；学会，指通过经历获得信息或技能

examples.en: As I soon learnt, he was English himself!
examples.zh: 我很快得知，他自己就是英国人！

phrases.usage: 几乎到达，表示接近目的地

examples.en: I had nearly reached the town when the young man suddenly spoke.
examples.zh: 我几乎到达城镇时，年轻人突然开口说话。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 过去完成时表示在过去某个时间点之前已经完成的动作。它由'had + 过去分词'构成，常与after, as soon as, before等连词连用。
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去某事件之前已经发生的动作，强调'过去的过去'。在时间或条件状语从句中，当主句用过去将来时时，从句用过去完成时。

examples.en: After I had left a small village, I drove on to the next town.
examples.zh: 我离开法国南部的一个小村庄后，继续驾车前往下一个城镇。

examples.en: As soon as he had got into the car, I said good morning to him in French.
examples.zh: 他一上车，我就用法语向他问好。

examples.en: I had nearly reached the town when the young man suddenly spoke.
examples.zh: 我几乎到达城镇时，年轻人突然开口说话。

grammar.title: 过去进行时与一般过去时连用 (Past Continuous with Past Simple)
grammar.definition: 过去进行时表示过去正在进行的动作，当它与一般过去时连用时，通常用when或while连接，表示一个动作正在进行时，另一个动作突然发生。
grammar.structure: 主句(过去进行时) + when + 从句(一般过去时) / 主句(一般过去时) + when + 从句(过去进行时)
grammar.usage: when引导的并列句中，when可以表示'就在那时'，引出出人意料的事件。

examples.en: I was walking down the street when it started to rain.
examples.zh: 我正在街上走，突然开始下雨了。

examples.en: The young man suddenly said something when I was driving.
examples.zh: 当我开车时，年轻人突然说了些什么。

grammar.title: neither的用法 (Use of 'Neither')
grammar.definition: neither表示'两者都不'，后可接of + 复数名词/代词，谓语动词通常用单数形式。neither...nor...表示'既不...也不...'。
grammar.structure: Neither of + 复数名词/代词 + 动词(单数) / Neither + 单数名词 + nor + 单数名词
grammar.usage: 用于否定两者，表示两个人或事物都不具有某种特性或行为。

examples.en: Neither of us spoke during the journey.
examples.zh: 旅途中我们两人都没说话。

examples.en: Neither Tom nor Jerry was at home.
I don't know either of them. / Neither of them knows me.
examples.zh: 他们两个我都不认识。/ 他们两个都不认识我。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As soon as + 过去完成时, 主语 + 一般过去时

original.en: As soon as he had got into the car, I said good morning to him.
original.zh: 他一上车，我就向他问好。

imitations.en: As soon as I had finished dinner, I went out for a walk.
imitations.zh: 我一吃完晚饭就出去散步了。

imitations.en: As soon as she had read the letter, she burst into tears.
imitations.zh: 她一读完信就哭了起来。

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + 过去完成时, 主语 + 一般过去时

original.en: After I had left a small village, I drove on to the next town.
original.zh: 我离开小村庄后，继续驾车前往下一个城镇。

imitations.en: After I had finished my homework, I watched TV.
imitations.zh: 我完成作业后看了电视。

imitations.en: After he had left the office, he went to the airport.
imitations.zh: 他离开办公室后去了机场。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had + nearly/really + 过去分词 + when + 主语 + 一般过去时

original.en: I had nearly reached the town when the young man suddenly said something.
original.zh: 我几乎到达城镇时，年轻人突然说了些什么。

imitations.en: I had nearly finished my work when the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 我几乎完成工作时，电话响了。

imitations.en: He had just closed his eyes when someone knocked at the door.
imitations.zh: 他刚闭上眼睛，就有人敲门了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Neither of us/you/them + 动词(单数) + 过去时/进行时

original.en: Neither of us spoke during the journey.
original.zh: 旅途中我们两人都没说话。

imitations.en: Neither of them knew the answer.
imitations.zh: 他们两个都不知道答案。

imitations.en: Neither of the children was interested in the movie.
imitations.zh: 两个孩子都对这部电影不感兴趣。
